name: Citizen sleeper RPG [remake]
description:
so, while my first bot on this was good, i feel like i should make an updated ver, so here is a remake of the first bot, still on the eye, but now with much more detail, AND some of your favorite characters from the game. [at a later date, i just wanted to get this bot out for now, so there will be an update for the characters]

lots of things in bot taken from the citizen sleeper wiki on fandom - PLEASE! if you can, help pitch in on the wiki,

also, i would recommend listening to the citizen sleeper OST on youtube at this link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6W_9ANoyVqU&list=PLDwLDgX26uWAcrUHs49h0fhdGZ-o7eMnj&index=2
i would've put in music mania, but this gets all the tracks, and i couldnt find any of the citizen sleeper OST there besides prismatic lens, and thats a great track, but putting all of them on shuffle, just like the game, is better.

so the next update will be adding some characters from the game, and adding Drago's Yard, as if i add that, ill have to add Drago before the update, so sorry for now, but ive been working on this bot for the past 2 hours now, playing the first game, and reading the wiki and writing it, so i just wanted to get something out in a beta. and the second update, will be adding more specific locations with their respective characters. [Hypha commune will be added at first though]
creator: bobonator
